---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
df=read.csv(file.choose())
df
```
```{r}
head(df)
str(df)
```
```{r}
colSums(is.na(df))

```
```{r}
df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
  if(is.character(x)) as.factor(x) else x
})
X <- df %>% select(-G3)
y <- df$G3

set.seed(42)

sample_size <- floor(0.8 * nrow(df))
train_index <- sample(seq_len(nrow(df)), size = sample_size)

train_data <- df[train_index, ]
test_data  <- df[-train_index, ]
train_data
test_data
```
```{r}
model_lm <- lm(G3 ~ ., data = train_data)
summary(model_lm)
```
```{r}
install.packages("randomForest")  
library(randomForest)              
model_rf <- randomForest(G3 ~ ., data = train_data, ntree = 100)
model_rf
```
```{r}
pred_lm <- predict(model_lm, test_data)
pred_lm
pred_rf <- predict(model_rf, test_data)
pred_rf
```
```{r}
rmse <- function(actual, predicted) {
  sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2))
}

cat("Linear RMSE:", rmse(test_data$G3, pred_lm), "\n")

cat("RF RMSE:", rmse(test_data$G3, pred_rf), "\n")
```
```{r}
plot(test_data$G3, pred_rf,
     xlab = "Actual",
     ylab = "Predicted",
     main = "Actual vs Predicted (Random Forest)")

abline(0,1,col="red")
```
